system_overview: The Orion DC-DC Converter Controller manages bidirectional power conversion between 400V and 800V HV buses.
diagnostics:
REQ ID | SWRS_DIAG_030
Customer Req ID | SDS-ORION-110
Milestone | PF2.0
Purpose | The software shall detect sensor failures and communication timeout.
Derived Requirement | No Such derived requirement is applicable.
Requirement Priority | High
Access Restrictions | No Specific access restrictions is applicable.
Input(s) | Sensor Inputs
Output(s) | Fault Status
Process | The software shall process requirement SWRS_DIAG_030 according to operating state machine and communication logic.
Mandatory Fields | No such mandatory fields is applicable.
Pre-Loaded Values | HVDCDCStatus = 0, NHVDCDCFault = 0
Default Values | Default values shall be applicable with respect to Pre-Loaded Values
Valid range of Values | Valid range shall be verified as per calibration data.
Data Latency Period | Data latency period is not applicable
Validation Rules | Validate using CANape and CANalyzer tools.
Constraints | Constraints is not applicable.
Effects on other systems/sub system | No effects on other system
Testability with respect to test environment | YES
Feasible within project constraints | YES
Critical | YES
Acceptance Criteria | Acceptance Criteria should be as per SECTION-6 ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
